Phase-3.NAME: Email Request Flow
Phase-3.Goal: Implement the request side of the portal so a user can submit an email and receive a magic link.

Steps.step-1: Define the landing page and submission UX in `M-WEB-UI`.
Steps.step-2: Design `POST /api/request` input validation and response contract in `M-WEB-API`.
Steps.step-3: Specify token lifecycle and cleanup behavior in `M-TOKEN`.
Steps.step-4: Specify Resend request/response mapping and failure normalization in `M-EMAIL`.

ExitCriteria.Item: Email request path is fully specified end-to-end
User-facing and operator-facing errors are defined
